options.name: -allow_shift_distance
options.description: specifies the distance between the new and the original position in the x and y direction

options.name: -area
options.description: Area in which fillers are to be inserted

options.name: -min_spacing_x
options.description: specifies the distance between edges of GA fillers in the horizontal direction

options.name: -min_spacing_y
options.description: specifies the distance between edges of GA fillers in the vertical direction

options.name: -offsetx
options.description: specifies the offset of GA fillers in the horizontal direction

options.name: -offsety
options.description: specifies the offset of GA fillers in the vertical direction

options.name: -powerDomain
options.description: Power domain for which fillers are to be inserted

options.name: -prefix
options.description: specifies the prefix for filler cell

options.name: -stepx
options.description: specifies the distance between GA fillers in the horizontal direction

options.name: -stepy
options.description: specifies the distance between GA fillers in the vertical direction
